info.description: API for video frame streaming and processing via WebSocket and video upload
info.title: Video Streaming API

get.description: Check if the API is running and healthy

Poll this endpoint to check the status of a video processing job and retrieve results when complete

**Job Status Values:**
- `queued`: Job created, waiting to start
- `processing`: Currently extracting and processing frames
- `completed`: All processing done, transcription available
- `failed`: Processing encountered an error

**Response includes:**
- Current status and progress (processed_batches / total_batches)
- Accumulated transcription results
- Full combined text when completed
- Video metadata and statistics

get.summary: WebSocket endpoint for video frame streaming

400.description: Bad Request - Failed to accept websocket

503.description: WebSocket capacity exhausted or server draining

post.summary: Upload video for async frame-by-frame processing

parameters.description: Minimum frame extraction interval (default: 1; automatically increased to keep extraction bounded)
parameters.name: interval

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid file or format

503.description: Upload capacity exhausted, validation interrupted, or server draining
